title: Pixar Inspired 3D Stylized Character Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Pixar Inspired 3D Stylized Character Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 3D stylized character portrait of young adult man with curly dark hair, black circular glasses, and small neck tattoo, rendered in a modern animation-film aesthetic. Subject: young adult man with curly dark hair, black circular glasses, and small neck tattoo wears dark hoodie and shows slight sideways smirk with relaxed confident expression, with expressive stylized anatomy, smooth detailed skin, and friendly cinematic character appeal. Scene: clean pale gray studio background remains clean and simple so the stylized portrait silhouette, glasses, hair, hoodie, and facial expression stay readable. Composition: Fixed close character portrait with head-and-shoulders framing, slight sideways expression, visible small neck tattoo, clean background, and centered animation-key-art balance. Signature Elements: Preserved pixar inspired 3d stylized character portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Pixar-inspired 3D character style, modern animation film aesthetic, soft studio lighting, smooth but detailed skin, ultra-sharp render, and cinematic polish. Color Palette: Fixed dark hoodie, black glasses, natural skin tones, pale gray background, soft warm highlights, and restrained studio neutrals. Lighting: Soft studio lighting with gentle facial highlights, clean glasses reflections, and smooth cinematic depth. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
